title: Arabian Oudh Diffuser Oil Set, Essential Oils by Dukhni | 3 x 10ml Oud Oil Gift Set for Diffuser & humidifier | 100% Pure Halal Oils | Relax with Home Aromatherapy, for Relaxation & Massage
features: The arabian oudh diffuser oil set includes three 10ml oud-based oils: Oud Ya Aini: Features warming top notes of saffron and nutmeg, leading to an earthy mix of nut grass and ylang-ylang, with a sultry base of amber and agarwood. Oud Al Khaleeji: Offers zesty top notes of basil, citron, and rose, blending into a base of sandalwood, cedarwood, and agarwood for an intense, oriental scent. Oud Al Saher: A modern floral fragrance with citrus top notes of orange, bergamot, and citron, a floral heart of jasmine, ylang-ylang, and rose, and a soft musk base.

HOW TO USE: Add 8-10 drops of the oud oil to water and burn it using a candle based or electronic diffuser. You can add more oil to your diffuser for a stronger scent or if burning in a very large area

WHERE TO USE: Dukhni oud diffuser oils are versatile and can be used to scent many different spaces. You can create a welcoming atmosphere in your home, maintain a pleasant aroma in your bathroom, enhance the ambiance in your office, or fragrance your store or office

WHEN TO USE: Dukhni diffuser oils are ideal for home aromatherapy. To relax and unwind, during massage, to make candles and other DIY scented projects. It's also 100% cruelty free & vegan making it an ethical choice

HERITAGE: Dukhni has specialized in the art of developing fragrances and incense since 1907. Our journey began in Aden, which formed part of the historic Incense Route. In our quest to be able to translate memories and emotions into experiences, we take great care in creating exceptional products that are compellingly precious yet personal
description: Product Description HOW TO USE THE DIFFUSER OILS STEP 1 Light the candle & place in holder STEP 2 Pour water into the bowl STEP 3 Add few drops of diffuser oil STEP 4 Relax and let the aroma seep in THE ESSENCE OF ARABIA IN EVERY DROP Our diffuser oils embody the authentic essence of Arabia, immersing you in the rich, luxurious notes of oud-based, long-lasting fragrances. Each carefully crafted oil is more than just a scent; it’s an invitation to embark on a sensory journey, transporting you to Mecca's sacred grounds and the Middle East's enchanting souks. As their aromatic warmth fills your space, these oils evoke moments of peace and nostalgia, celebrating the cherished heritage of Arabia. A TOUCH OF LUXURY FOR EVERY MOMENT Whether it’s a quiet evening with family, a serene moment of prayer, or preparing your home to welcome guests, our diffuser oils are the perfect companion. Designed to complement every occasion, they elevate your space with the sophisticated allure of oud, adding a touch of elegance to your cherished moments. BENEFITS OF USING DIFFUSER OILS HELPS YOU FOCUS Evokes a calming atmosphere that helps you focus ENERGIZES YOUR BODY Boosts energy with refreshing aromas ELEVATES YOUR MOOD Enhances your mood after a long day HALAL & SUITABLE FOR PRAYER Creates a sacred ambience during prayer time
